open_jaw_pairs.note: Virtu Ferries via Pozzallo (~90min drive CTA->Pozzallo!), 105min crossing, 2-3/day summer, foot EUR37-111 (researched 2026-07-12, Virtu Ferries). Sources: virtuferries.com; ferryhopper.com/en/ferry-routes/direct/malta-sicily

SeaJets fast ~95min ~3/day summer + Blue Star conventional ~285min EUR15; fast economy EUR50-70 (researched 2026-07-12, SeaJets/Blue Star). Sources: ferryhopper.com/en/ferry-routes/direct/heraklion-to-santorini; directferries.com

drive ~140min to Kyllini + Levante 75min, 6/day summer, foot ~EUR10-15; marginal corridor, long overland leg (researched 2026-07-12, Levante Ferries). Sources: levanteferries.com/en/routes/kyllini-zakynthos
CFU->Igoumenitsa 80min ferry, 20+/day, foot EUR7-15, then ~76min drive to PVK (researched live 2026-07-12). Sources: directferries.com/corfu_igoumenitsa_ferry.htm
Messina Strait shuttle 20min every 20-30min (~52/day), foot EUR3-8; drive legs ~80min each side (researched live 2026-07-12). Sources: directferries.com/villa_san_giovanni_messina_ferry.htm

gateways.note: Dodekanisos Seaways, 5-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Near-daily year-round; top link in this chain group. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
5-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fast ferry 5-7x/week year-round (book the fast sailing); slow ferry ~4h, 2-4x/week backup. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fastest chain in the catalog; several sailings daily year-round. Taxi dominates cost. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Volcano day-hike destination; 5-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
5-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
~daily in summer, several/week in winter. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
UNESCO site; near-daily in summer. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Connection-dependent via Kalymnos; direct sailing only ~1x/week Jun-Sep. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Near-daily in summer, several/week in winter; taxi fare often shared. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Frequent year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Untouristed; 4-7x/week including off-season. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
1-2x/day high season, 4-5x/week low season. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
SeaJets direct sailing May-Oct only; winter needs a Naxos connection. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Ermoupoli; daily year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Mainstream; up to 10x/day Apr-Nov. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Mainstream; up to 10x/day Apr-Nov. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Via Paros + Pounta shuttle, every 20-60m year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.

Bundle also covers Iraklia/Schinoussa sub-stops on the same run. Frequent in summer; winter via Skopelitis ~6x/week (winter service is thinner - see season). Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Metro to Piraeus (bus alt. 90m/EUR5.50); near-hourly ferries year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Car-free island; daily year-round fast ferry. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily; fast direct sailing only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
4-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Foodie island; 6-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
High-speed ferry, near-daily summer / year-round. Primary routing via ATH. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.

JTR link runs Jun-Sep only and is pricier than the ATH routing. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season. JTR fares not individually published in catalog — legs and total are estimates ('pricey' per research); verify before quoting. ATH routing is the sourced/cheaper option.
High-speed ferry, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Taxi-dominated cost - flag prominently; multiple daily sailings in season. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Thin schedule, 3-7x/week; better used as a Milos hop. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fiddly Kavala leg - build in slack; ferry every 30-45m in summer. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Over the practical time cap; <=11x/week in summer. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
2-7x/week, reduced in winter. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Local boat 2x/day, spring-autumn only; verify locally, low frequency. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
~5x/day, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Ferry Mon/Wed/Fri only, ~3x/week. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Best Ionian chain in the catalog; daily year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
No viable bus for the land leg (taxi-only); ferry 6-7x/week year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Same taxi-only land-leg problem as Kythira; superb shuttle every ~30m, daily year-round, but taxi-hinged cost. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Giuntabus 4x/day summer, 2x/day winter; Liberty Lines hydrofoil. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Giuntabus 4x/day summer, 2x/day winter; Liberty Lines hydrofoil. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Needs an early arrival to make connections; thinner off-season. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.

SUF routing only - via CTA is a >5h drop. Liberty Lines direct hydrofoil ~Jun 20-Sep only. Fare not published for this segment - estimated from comparable Aeolian hydrofoil fares (Panarea/Vulcano); verify before quoting. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Thin schedule in winter. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Very frequent hydrofoils, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Frequent, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
~4x/day year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
4x/day summer, ~1x/day winter - verify the off-season return sailing. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Cheapest chain in the catalog; very frequent, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Hydrofoil every 30-60m. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Frequent hydrofoils, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Laziomar; up to 28 sailings/week in high season. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Laziomar; 23 sailings/week, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fragile dependency on a direct bus that runs only 2x/day; ferries 4-12x/day. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
PisaMover + train; 40+ sailings/day, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.

Caprera reachable from La Maddalena by causeway - same bundle. Delcomar shuttle-grade frequency, every 15-30m year-round; sparse bus alt. (1h30, EUR4-5). Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Land leg is only 1-2 buses/day - timing risk; Delcomar ~12x/day. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Plan around sailing days (Tue/Fri/Sun x2 low season, more Jun-Sep); no on-island lodging. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
NLG jet, ~daily Jun-Sep, reduced off-season; best Apr-Oct (a BDS routing exists but is worse - don't advertise it). Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Best chain in the catalog; Gozo Channel every 30m, 24/7/365. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Every 30m, Apr-Oct only; day-trip only, no lodging. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
~30 sailings/day in summer, daily year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Apr-Oct only, permit-capped; day-trip only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Feb-Oct, Tue-Sun; day-trip only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fred Olsen, 3-8 sailings/day, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
16-20 sailings/day in summer. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Thin schedule, ~2 sailings/day average; Binter flights are realistically a better option. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily 09:45-15:30 window with a 4h-stay cap; day-trip only, permit required. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Jadrolinija, up to 22 sailings/day. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Jadrolinija, 4-6 sailings/day, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Catamaran ~19 sailings/day high season, 2-3/day winter (car ferry to Stari Grad is a 110m alt.). Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Catamaran daily year-round (car ferry alt. 2h20). Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
TP Line catamaran; ~1/day high season, 3x/week off-season - remote getaway. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Routed via Sibenik, a non-registry-gateway leg - gateway friction; 3-5 sailings/day. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Frequent shuttle boat; day-trip character. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Best Croatian fit in the catalog; TP Line, year-round (Krilo-Pomena leg runs May-Oct, reduced winter service otherwise). Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Elaphiti bundle - same Jadrolinija line 807 also serves Kolocep and Lopud sub-stops; several sailings/day, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Krilo/TP Line, ~1x/day, May 1-Oct 15 only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fallback routing, ~4h, Apr-Oct only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Fastest hop in the catalog; Jadrolinija, 17-29 sailings/day. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Biograd land leg is taxi-only; frequent year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Telascica NP; G&V/TP Line/Jadrolinija, 3-4x/day winter, more in summer. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Viamar, ~May 9-mid-Oct only, 1-2 sailings/day, 350/day visitor cap; basic lodging only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Car-free village with real lodging; several sailings/day, year-round. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Daily, denser Jun-Sep; day-trip only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
Porto Santo Line, ~1/day (6-7 days/week in season; ~2/week plus dry-dock gaps Oct-May) - plan around the single daily sailing. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
<=5 sailings/day, May-Oct only; near-day-trip, ~5 monastery rooms only. Source: operator schedules/Ferryhopper, 2026 season.
